title: pelargonium × metternichianum
intro: Pelargonium × metternichianum, also known as Rose Geranium, is a hybrid plant species within the Pelargonium genus, characterized by its fragrant rose-scented leaves and stems. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects, which can help to soothe digestive issues, reduce stress and anxiety, and alleviate symptoms of menopause. The health benefits of Rose Geranium include reducing inflammation, promoting relaxation, and improving sleep quality, making it a popular herbal remedy for various health concerns. Rose Geranium is often prepared as a herbal tea, essential oil, or tincture, and can be used in aromatherapy, skincare products, and as a natural remedy for various health issues.
